entity_views.network: Whole-network monthly KPI view for headline descriptive trend work.
entity_views.line: Line-level monthly KPI view for drilldowns and supporting comparisons.

metric_definitions.punctuality_p3: Share of arrivals no more than 3:59 minutes late.
metric_definitions.punctuality_p0: Share of arrivals no more than 0:59 minutes late.
metric_definitions.reliability_zg: Delivered train-km divided by scheduled train-km on the day-current timetable.
metric_definitions.overall_ranking: VBB line comparison score combining punctuality and reliability.

assumptions: Monthly trend rows preserve the published VBB monthly KPI values without interpolation or quartering.
Whole-network punctuality_p3 and reliability_zg remain the headline primary evidence series.
Line-level values remain drilldown evidence and should not replace the whole-network headline series.
exclusions: Pre-2023 monthly rows are excluded from this chart-ready trend window.
Pre-2019 VBB archive material is not merged into this view because compatibility is not yet proven.
Future or unavailable months omitted by the source remain absent instead of being backfilled.
coverage_gaps: The requested range runs through 2026-12, but the current observed data ends at 2026-05.
Coverage status is 'observed' for published months only; missing future months are described here rather than synthesized into placeholder rows.
